extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH won Stage 10 sprint in Valence with textbook leadout from Deceuninck-Quick-Step, taking his 33rd Tour stage to sit one behind Merckx's record.
tactical_patterns: COLBRELLI attacked at intermediate sprint with MØRKØV to pressure CAVENDISH but Deceuninck neutralized immediately despite energy cost
UAE attempted to accelerate before intermediate sprint to hurt CAVENDISH but Quick-Step countered to protect green jersey math
Crosswind sections exposed POGAČAR with only 1-2 teammates, but his individual strength negated team weakness
Deceuninck committed full team resources to controlling flat stage despite three mountain days, revealing priority on Cavendish sprint opportunities

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: team going 'full gas' despite climb concerns, winning with 33 stages shows peak form exploitation
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: negative: wasted energy attacking intermediate sprint that Quick-Step easily covered, poor energy management
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: isolated in crosswinds with minimal team support but positioned himself perfectly regardless
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: second consecutive day in polka dots, team desperately fighting for KOM as major season objective
